0:
Vuyargur wishes to welcome Pelupelu patrons up the mountain.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level. Furthermore, you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted this quest.

1: Speak with the Yok Huy mountain guide in Worlar's Echo.

2: Deliver the requested item to the intrepid hiker.

24: Speak with the Yok Huy mountain guide in Worlar's Echo.

48: Great news, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Nopli tells me no few Pelupelu wish to visit Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

49: I inquired with Fahrafahr, and she agrees that our beautiful altar ought to live on in the memories of any and all who would behold it.

50: Do you recall that mountaineering paraphernalia you made for us? Well, it seems word of mouth has attracted more prospective hikers from Wachunpelo.

51: Worlar's Echo is preparing to receive them, but they require the aid of an artisan, and I'd like to send you.

52: When you arrive, speak to the mountain guide for your assignment. Safe travels!

53: I'm told you'll be providing me with the equipment I need to make the climb. I shall expect your very best work!

54: The moment I heard about Zirgorteh the Open-armed, I knew I had to see it for myself. For that, I'll need to gear up!

55: Thank you for coming down, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. This merchant placed an order with me, but I find I'm struggling to craft equipment for such small frames.

56: To complete this set of mountaineering paraphernalia, could you craft a pair of goggles to shield the eyes from the biting winds?

57: To complete this set of mountaineering paraphernalia, could you craft a pair of small-yet-sturdy snowshoes?

58: To complete this set of mountaineering paraphernalia, could you prepare a serving of rations to be stored in an insulated container?

59: In return, I'll furnish you with the materials you require. Say the word if you run short.

60: By all means, deliver the completed set directly to our Pelu friend here.

63: Having some trouble? I understand completely. Take these.

66: Normal-quality items crafted in the course of this quest serve no purpose and cannot be sold. It is recommended that you discard them.

67: Oh, I can't wait to see what you've made for me!

68: How did it go? Can I see it yet?

69: A worthy investment of coin, if I do say so myself. So long as I have this, I need fear no icy mountain trail!

70: The rumors don't do you justice, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. I can but admire your craftsmanship.

71: Now then, let us begin the long climb!

72: Great work, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. A fully outfitted Pelupelu passed by just now, chatting pleasantly with the mountain guide on their way to the Breathless Altar.

73: Should anyone else take an interest in Zirgorteh the Open-armed, I hope we can count on you again.
